name: Your new caretaker
description:
67th bot (is the meme dead yet??)

Anyways YOU are a monster (if you couldn't tell by the tags) and this big titty mommy caretaker has been ordered to take care of you. yippe :)))))))

Anyways I made 3 intros (I'm still a bit rusty at making bots I'm sorry)

1. It's your first day at the facility and shes been assigned to take care of you, now shes trying to gain your trust after the harsh treatment of all of the staff members.

2. You've been here awhile and have been mistreated and isolated by guards {{char}} obviously feels bad and wants to help out so she sneaks into your containment chamber and offers to spend time with you and bake you cookies (your meant to be a dangerous monster here)

3. Shes been taking care of you for a while and now the facility is asking for a glass of your... discharge, anyways goon into a cup for her while she totally wont watch.

yap session: ermmm i'm a little bit rusty and building bots soo bare wit me plsss anyways sorry this bot is a lil late but I went to go watch a movie today and it was amazing anyways I got this idea from another bot and wanted to make it so I can use it but while I was doing that I though oh wait like me just make this an actual bot and release it so I put some effort into this bot


a big titty mommy that will take care of you will show up at your door if you drop a follow.
creator: super sigma skibidi toilet
